/usr/bin/c++ -g "CMakeFiles/makesdr-example-qt-json-config.dir/examples/rpi/qt-json-config/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-example-qt-json-config.dir/examples/rpi/qt-json-config/RadioControlSink.cpp.o" -o makesdr-example-qt-json-config  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libliquid.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libasound.so -lusb-1.0 -lhidapi-libusb /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 src/config/json/libmakesdr-config-json.a src/settings/control/radio/libmakesdr-settings-control-radio.a src/settings/control/factory/libmakesdr-settings-control-factory.a src/settings/control/hal/FunCubeDongle/libmakesdr-settings-control-hal-funcube.a src/settings/control/hal/usb/libmakesdr-settings-control-hal-usb.a -lusb-1.0 -lhidapi-libusb src/settings/control/qt/libmakesdr-settings-control-qt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 src/settings/control/hal/gpio/libmakesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.a src/core/thread/libmakesdr-core-thread.a src/settings/model/core/libmakesdr-settings-model-core.a src/settings/model/proto/libmakesdr-settings-model-proto.a nanopb/libprotobuf-nanopbd.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgpiod.so
